title: cineraria linifolia
intro: Cineraria linifolia, also known as the silver daisy or cineraria, is a flowering plant species belonging to the Asteraceae family. Traditionally, the plant has been used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits associated with Cineraria linifolia include its ability to aid in the treatment of skin conditions, such as acne and eczema, and to reduce inflammation. Cineraria linifolia is often used in herbal preparations, including teas and topical creams, to harness its medicinal properties for various health benefits.
